name: Community
description: Community infrastructure — salon archives, reading group curricula, adaptive syllabi, contributor profiles, shared PostgreSQL layer, FastAPI portal with full-text search, Atom feeds, and WebSocket live rooms
completion: 100% — 6 repos (1 flagship, 4 standard, 1 infrastructure). All 6 PUBLIC_PROCESS. 435 tests across 5 active repos. Neon PostgreSQL with 4 schemas. Flagship deployed to Render.
portfolio_angle: Evidence of building collaborative infrastructure. Demonstrates community contribution model. Relevant for residencies (Eyebeam, Somerset House) and fellowships valuing ecosystem contribution.

repositories.name: koinonia-db
repositories.description: Shared SQLAlchemy 2.0 models, Alembic migrations, PostgreSQL seed data for all ORGAN-VI schemas (salons, reading, community, syllabus)
repositories.note: Neon PostgreSQL provisioned. 4 schemas, 108 tests, CI green. Foundation for all ORGAN-VI repos. Promoted CANDIDATE→PUBLIC_PROCESS 2026-02-24 (System-Wide Activation Sprint).

repositories.name: community-hub
repositories.description: FastAPI flagship portal — salon archive, curricula browser, contributor profiles, full-text search, adaptive syllabus, Atom feeds, WebSocket live rooms
repositories.note: 122 tests, CSRF, rate limiting, 8 route modules. Deployed to Render. Promoted CANDIDATE→PUBLIC_PROCESS 2026-02-24 (System-Wide Activation Sprint).

repositories.name: salon-archive
repositories.description: Archive infrastructure for intellectual salons: transcription pipeline, topic taxonomy, and session metadata aligned with the eight-organ model
repositories.note: Created and README deployed 2026-02-11 Gap-Fill Sprint (3,054 words). CONSOLIDATION-II: Python prototype deployed — transcription, taxonomy, sessions modules. Tests + CI green. Phase 1-2: DB integration, repository pattern, 87 tests. Promoted CANDIDATE→PUBLIC_PROCESS 2026-02-24 (System-Wide Activation Sprint).

repositories.name: reading-group-curriculum
repositories.description: Structured reading group curricula spanning eight-organ domains: 8-12 week programs with curated reading lists, discussion guides, and exercises
repositories.note: Created and README deployed 2026-02-11 Gap-Fill Sprint (3,200 words). CONSOLIDATION-II: Python prototype deployed — curriculum, reading_list, guides modules. Tests + CI green. Phase 1-2: DB integration, repository pattern, 47 tests. Promoted CANDIDATE→PUBLIC_PROCESS 2026-02-24 (System-Wide Activation Sprint).

repositories.name: adaptive-personal-syllabus
repositories.description: AI-personalized education system with multi-module curriculum spanning OS development, algorithms, DSLs, and mixed reality. Features Wings multi-artifact framework.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: HIGH - Demonstrates educational infrastructure and AI personalization
repositories.note: Created GENESIS Sprint 2026-02-12. README deployed (3,471 words). 38 tests, CI green, working CLI (syllabus/aps). Phase 3: promoted to CANDIDATE. Promoted CANDIDATE→PUBLIC_PROCESS 2026-02-24 (System-Wide Activation Sprint).

repositories.name: .github
repositories.description: Organization profile and community health files
repositories.note: Silver Sprint: org profile README expanded to 772 words (2026-02-10). GENESIS Sprint: promoted DESIGN_ONLY→PRODUCTION 2026-02-12. Phase 2: updated with full repo table. Promoted CANDIDATE→PUBLIC_PROCESS 2026-02-24 (System-Wide Activation Sprint).
